name: Seeker's Armguard

active.name: Time Stop
active.effects: Put yourself in {{tip|stasis (buff)|stasis}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds, rendering you {{tip|untargetable}} and {{tip|invulnerable}} for the duration but also unable to move, declare [[basic attack]]s, cast [[champion ability|abilities]], use [[summoner spell]]s, or [[active ability items|activate items]].

effects_structured.raw: Activate Time Stop to enter 2.5 seconds of stasis, becoming untargetable and invulnerable while unable to act.

simpleDescription: Activate to become invincible but unable to take actions

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Seeker's Armguard is represented as the Time Stop active variant (single-use stasis entry) in the current dataset/version and transforms into Shattered Armguard after use.

Execution-semantics review: Time Stop is immediate (no cast time), grants 2.5 seconds of self stasis/untargetability/invulnerability, and prevents movement, attacks, abilities, summoner spells, and item activations while active.
Interaction note: page notes include a post-activation Quicksilver lockout window (0.5 seconds) and no stealth break on cast.
Wave 120 (2026-02-25): `on_activate` entries with no fixed cooldown now use explicit `activation_cadence` schema (single-use transform model).
